narrative:
Perry / Lake Lorelei (precinct in Brown County) has 866 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.6 percentage points.
